feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Real Estate Cost Settlement
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We would like to use the Real Estate Cost Settlement to settle costs to our tenants. In a starter public cloud system we activated the scope item 6N8. When trying to create service groups, we noticed that it is a must to have a building / land object to assign to the service group. We cannot create these objects in our system, but we are able to create usable- and rentable objects.

Does this mean that we can only use this Real Estate Cost Settlement if we have integration with a master data system like Planon? We are not planning to use such a master data system, but we would like to create a cost settlement.

Thanks in advance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: New Question Subject Enter a subject Where do you want to post this question? Financial Management
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently a student using the SAP Learning Hub and I am very interested in building my career in SAP Financial Accounting.

In my professional background, I worked as an Accounts Payable end user, and now my goal is to become SAP certified and move toward an SAP Functional Consultant role in Finance.

As a beginner, I find the SAP learning environment very broad, and sometimes I feel confused about where to start and which courses to complete before attempting the main certification.

My target certification is:
SAP Certified – Implementation Consultant – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Financial Accounting.

I would sincerely appreciate your guidance on a step-by-step learning path starting from foundational courses up to the certification level.

Specifically, I would like to know:

  1. Which beginner or prerequisite courses you recommend before starting the main certification learning journey

  2. Whether there are specific foundational SAP Finance or system navigation courses suitable for someone with Accounts Payable experience

  3. Any recommended practice systems or preparation resources to build confidence before taking the certification exam

My objective is to start from the basics, build strong knowledge gradually, and prepare properly for certification.

Thank you very much for your support and guidance.

Kind regards,
Syeda Munazza Bukhari

entry.title: SAP Public cloud - Cannot remove configuration - customized customer condition group
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I created customer condition group= 10 to 20.

After creation in dev, there is no deletion button.

Could you advise where I can remove them? as there is limitation on running number and I need to rearrange it

 

.

entry.title: Unable to Modify Email Template – Workflow Notification Issue
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are currently facing an issue related to workflow email notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

We identified that the email template used for Purchase Order approval notifications contains a hardcoded URL pointing to the Test tenant instead of the Production tenant.

We are unable to implement the correction due to system restrictions:

  • The template cannot be edited in the Production system
  • The template is not available for selection in the "Export Software Collection" app
  • Copying or creating a new template in Production is also restricted

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Tax Calculation for Free Item and Tax amount to be borne by seller
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement from India based client related to Free Goods. 

They run free schemes like 10+1 Free. GST tax to be paid for the Free item as per Government rule. As per Client requirement, tax will be paid by the seller and not to be charged to the customer for Free item.  They are using S4 HANA PUC. Using CBXN item category for free goods.

Example: Saleable Goods Price - 100, Qty - 10, Order Amount - 1000, Tax - 50

Free Goods Sale Price - 100, Qty -1, Sales Value - 100, Tax - 5. Discount for Customer - 105. 

We tried to achieve by applying standard 100% discount condition before calculation of tax at item level. This will make the tax rate 0 which is not legally acceptable.

We tried to achieve by applying standard 100% discount condition after calculation of tax at item level. But this is driving the Order Item Net value (negative) -5 with Tax amount as 5. This cannot be submitted to GST.

If the discount applied at order header level (with additional Routines), then it will be distributed to all line items as per standard which is not acceptable by the client.

Please suggest.

Regards,

Krishna

entry.title: Relationship between CBC tenant and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition tenants - Is it 1:1 or 1:N?
entry.content:
**Title:**
Relationship between CBC tenant and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition tenants - Is it 1:1 or 1:N?

**Body:**

Hello SAP Community,

I'm trying to understand the relationship between the CBC (Central Business Configuration) tenant and the various S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition tenants throughout the implementation lifecycle.

**Background:**
From my understanding, the landscape includes the following tenants:

**During Starter Phase:**
- 1 CBC Tenant
- Starter Customizing Tenant (100)
- Starter Development Tenant (080)

**After 3-System Landscape Provisioning:**
- 1 CBC Tenant (same as above?)
- Development Customizing Tenant (100)
- Development Development Tenant (080)
- Test Tenant
- Production Tenant

**My Question:**
Is the CBC tenant relationship to these S/4HANA tenants **1:1** or **1:N**?

Specifically:
1. Does **one CBC tenant** manage configuration for **all five** S/4HANA tenants (Starter Customizing, Starter Development, Dev Customizing, Dev Development, Test, Production)?
2. Or does each S/4HANA tenant have its **own dedicated CBC tenant**?
3. When transitioning from Starter to the 3-system landscape, is it the same CBC tenant or a new one?

**Why this matters:**
I need to understand:
- Whether I create separate CBC projects within one CBC tenant for each target tenant
- Or if there are multiple CBC tenant instances
- How CBC orchestrates configuration across these six different tenants

Any clarification with documentation references would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards

entry.title: Could calendar configuration transport to Q & P tenant by change request？
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When i made calendar configuration in the Customizing system, it didn't generate the change request automatically.

Could calendar configuration transport to Q & P tenant by change request？

Or could i make calendar configuration directly in Q & P tenant ？

Thanks

Ying

entry.title: Can not use default value function for Sales Contract type
entry.content: My users need a default value for the Sales Contract Type field when creating a sales contract. Although they have maintained the value in the Default Values settings, the field remains empty when using the Manage Sales Contracts app. Other fields, such as Sales Organization, Distribution Channel, and Division, are working as expected

entry.title: API to GET RFQ PDF using RFQ number in S4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created an Iflow in SAP Integration suite where we are using API_RFQ_PROCESS_SRV to fetch the RFQ data from S4 hana public cloud system. We want to fetch the RFQ PDF using the RFQ number which is not available in this API, unlike for Purchase Order I can fetch using API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/GetPDF. Kindly suggest the API to fetch the RFQ PDF in Iflow from S4 hana public cloud.

Regards,

Hinal

entry.title: Buy any combination totaling 10 from a group → get 1 free material
entry.content:
Hello SAP Exprts,

If a customer purchases a total quantity of 10 or more units from a defined material group, then 1 unit of a predefined free material should be automatically added to the sales order.

How can this be configured in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602? If there are alternative approaches—such as customization, APIs, or other methods—please guide me on how to achieve this.

Please refer to the examples provided below.

1. 

A = 10

👉 Total = 10
✔ Free material added

2.

A = 5

B = 5
👉 Total = 10
✔ Free material added

3. 

A = 2

B = 3

C = 5

👉 Total = 10
✔ Free material added

entry.title: NVV and NAV for expense gl and tax computation
entry.content:
We are trying to create a gl account for tax that we can present in P&L report.

One way is to create expense gl as offsetting account.

Since it is not right to set expense gl for input and output tax, is there any other way we can achieve this?

Will tax codes NAV and NVV can solve our issue?

Thank you.

entry.title: Difference between variable and fixed costsin the Create Material Cost Estimate app
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We use S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition and we have a following question.


In the Manage Cost Rates app, I defined an activity type for labor with

a variable rate of 50 USD and a fixed rate of 50 USD.

 

When I run the Create Material Cost Estimate app with a costing lot size of 10,

both variable cost and fixed cost are calculated as 500 USD

(50 × 10) in the cost estimate.

 

Also, during production confirmation posting,

both variable and fixed costs are posted as

actual activity quantity × cost rate.

 

My understanding was that fixed costs should not increase

in proportion to the production quantity,

so I expected fixed cost to remain 50 USD instead of 500 USD.

 

At which point does the difference between variable and fixed costs

become apparent in the Create Material Cost Estimate app,

or in which subsequent SAP process is this difference recognized?

 

Thank you  in advance for your support.

Fujita

entry.title: Balance Sheet/Income Statement PDF Download
entry.content:
Hi Support,

we observed, that Poland and Germany have different Forms regarding Financial Statement. Can we assign the polish version also to our german company codes?

 

Kind regards
Gaja

entry.title: Output Parameter Determination Invoice Send To Customer Via Email In SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Currently we are facing issue as we have mapped output parameter determination in SAP, and written BADI APOC_ADD_EMAIL_RECIPIENTS (OUTPUTCONTROLAPPLOBJECTTYPE SALES_DOCUMENT) with custom logic to achieve the email functionality results, to trigger the 3 emails maintained in Customer Master. But the issue is coming in smart form but as SAP we are integrated with GSP partner E-invoice generated in the system via E-document cockpit 

PDF delivered to customer, but E-invoice QR code and E-invoice number is not coming.

I am attaching the Document which prepared for Output Parameter Determination app in Public Cloud.

Kindly request you to help why the E-invoice QR Code and E-invoice number is not print on smart form. Is there any configuration is missing or anything which we are missing to map.

Kindly check and guide us.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: YCOA Account Groups - Verification of Usage and Difference between ABST and RECN
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and preparing documentation for YCOA standard account groups. I've compiled descriptions based on typical GL account assignments, but I cannot find official documentation that defines the intended usage of each group.

**YCOA Account Groups - My Understanding:**

| Account Group | Text | My Understanding of Usage |
|--------------|------|---------------------------|
| ABST | Recon.account AP/AR | Reconciliation accounts linked to subledgers (Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, etc.) |
| ANL. | Fixed assets accounts | Tangible fixed assets (Buildings, Machinery, Land, etc.) |
| ERG. | Income statement accounts | Revenue and expense accounts (Sales Revenue, COGS, SG&A, etc.) |
| FIN. | Liquid funds accounts | Cash and highly liquid assets (Petty Cash, Bank Accounts, etc.) |
| MAT. | Materials management accounts | Inventory-related accounts (Raw Materials, WIP, Finished Goods, etc.) |
| RECN | ReconAcct ARAP Ready for Input | Reconciliation accounts allowing direct manual posting for AR/AP |
| SAKO | G/L accounts (general) | General GL accounts (Short-term Investments, Notes Payable, etc.) |
| SASL | G/L accounts (ledger-spec. OI) | Ledger-specific accounts |
| SECC | Secondary costs / revenues | Secondary cost elements for cost allocation (Allocation accounts, Transfer accounts, etc.) |

**Questions:**

**1. Is my understanding of these account groups correct? If not, which parts are incorrect?**

**2. What is the functional difference between ABST and RECN, and when should each be used?**
- What is the difference in posting behavior?
- Are there specific business scenarios where RECN is required instead of ABST?
- From SAP Note 2853117, I understand RECN is used with "Alternative Reconciliation Accounts" functionality - when is this needed?

**System Details:**
- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- Chart of Accounts: YCOA

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Issue with Bank Statement Processing Rules for Bank Fees
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are currently experiencing an issue with the processing rules configured for bank fees in bank statement uploads.

We have defined an automated rule for our client to enable automatic posting of bank fees during the bank statement import. The rule is set up with the following criteria:

  • Company Code: equal to 4400
  • Memo Line: contains (chinese characters)
  • House Bank: between BOC1 and BOC2
  • House Bank Account: between CNY1 and CNY2
  • House Bank Account: between EUR1 and EUR2
  • House Bank Account: between USD1 and USD2

The posting is configured to GL account 71000000 along with the relevant cost center.

However, we have observed that when the memo line contains the text "BANK CHARGES" (Latin characters), the system correctly posts the bank fees automatically. In contrast, when Chinese characters are used, the automatic posting is not triggered.

Could you please confirm whether processing rules for bank statements support the use of non-Latin (e.g., Chinese) characters in memo lines? Additionally, we would appreciate any guidance on how to enable correct processing in such cases.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Claudia

entry.title: Cannot add new entries in Define attributes of system message to block when No info record exist
entry.content:
Hello

I'm trying to enable this system message  136 application area 06 to get a blocking message when no info record is found at the purchase order level.

Apparently we cannot add new entries in SAP S4HANA public cloud for Define attributes of system message, Is there any work around available ?

thanks in advance

entry.title: Foreign Exchange Adjustments for Cash G/L Accounts (Mixed Currencies)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

We have the below request from the business. They would like to inquire about SAP process options to record unrealized gain/loss in SAP for cash G/L account balances as of the month‑end reporting date.

  • They have several accounts that are functionally different from the company code/functional currency of the legal entity (for example, for a UK company code where the company code currency is GBP, the balance is in USD).
  • They are not using the standard Foreign Currency Valuation app/process, as some G/L accounts have a mix of currencies, some of which do not represent “true” G/L balances (posted and cleared in different currencies).
  • Profit centers are often not reconciled to reduce unnecessary postings.
  • They are currently using the Verify Currency Adjustment app to record manual FX adjustments. They would like to know if there is an alternate, more systematic way to record these month‑end adjustments.

If anyone has experienced a similar scenario, could you please share your feedback or recommendations?

Thanks,
Priya

entry.title: How to Copy Price From PO to Intercompany Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello,

How to copy price from Purchase Order to Intercompany Sales Order an even Purchasing Inforecord for the supplier which represents the suppling plant and the material and purchanse org?

Issue: SAP does NOT copy PO price to Intercompany Sales Order automatically

entry.title: Sorting Issue in Billing Document Item Details CDS Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently We are experiencing an issue with sorting of Billing Document Item which were associated with Invoice List documents in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Business Requirement:

To display Invoice List data in a structured hierarchy in the PDF Document developed on BTP.

  • Header Level: Invoice List
  • Item Level: Invoice List Items
  • Sub-Item Level: Billing Documents associated with each Invoice List item

The expectation is that Billing Document Items should be displayed in a consistent and sorted order (e.g., by Billing Document and Item Number in ascending order).

Current Behavior:

The Billing Document Item details (3rd level CDS) are not appearing in a consistent or sorted order. The sequence appears random or inconsistent across executions.

Technical Details:

  • We are using only standard CDS views 
  • CDS hierarchy:
    1. Invoice List (Header)
    2. Invoice List Item (Level 2)
    3. Billing Document Items (Level 3)</
